title: For Rent - Luxury Family Villa with Private Apartment & Pool – Blue Bay, Curaçao
description: Experience upscale island living in this exceptional rental property located in the prestigious gated community of Blue Bay, Curaçao. This spacious and beautifully designed villa combines comfort, elegance, and functionality — making it the perfect home for large families, executives, or tenants seeking a premium Caribbean lifestyle. The main residence features 6 spacious bedrooms and 4 modern bathrooms, complemented by a bright living room, welcoming sitting area, fully equipped kitchen, and dining space ideal for entertaining. A dedicated entertainment area with a billiard table creates the perfect atmosphere for relaxing evenings with family and friends. Step outside and enjoy your private swimming pool surrounded by a tropical garden, offering peace, privacy, and the ultimate outdoor living experience. An additional highlight of the property is the fully independent downstairs apartment, complete with its own kitchen, living room, 2 bedrooms, and 2 bathrooms — ideal for guests, extended family, staff accommodation, or a private workspace. Located near beaches, restaurants, golf facilities, and resort amenities, this property offers the perfect balance between luxury, convenience, and island charm. Contact Bai Pe Real Estate for more information or to schedule a private viewing.

title: EXCLUSIVE PRE-SALE | Brand New Family Home | Kwartje, Curaçao
description: An exceptional opportunity to secure a brand-new family residence in one of Curaçao’s centrally positioned residential areas. Located in Kwartje, this exclusive pre-sale development combines modern design, comfort, and convenience, offering an ideal lifestyle for families and investors seeking long-term value. Perfectly positioned near St. Rosaweg, one of the island’s most established and convenient commercial corridors, residents benefit from easy access to supermarkets, restaurants, schools, fitness facilities, pharmacies, hardware stores, gas stations, and everyday amenities, all within approximately 3–10 minutes. Popular destinations such as Jan Thiel Beach can be reached in approximately 15 minutes. This modern 2-storey residence offers spacious living areas, a private swimming pool, and private freehold land, creating an ideal setting for comfortable family living and long-term investment value. The property is available through an exclusive pre-sale structure where purchase and transfer are completed through the notary, with construction expected to be finalized within approximately 6–8 months after purchase. For additional information or a private consultation, contact us.
features: Construction completion approximately 6–8 months after purchase
Approximately 15 minutes from Jan Thiel Beach

title: For Rent – Semi-Furnished House | Tra'i Seru, Curaçao
description: Comfortable and centrally located semi-furnished home available for rent in Tra'i Seru. This property features 3 bedrooms with air conditioning, 1 bathroom, a new kitchen, and a cozy living room. Conveniently located near Brievengat, with supermarkets, gas stations, restaurants, pharmacies, schools, and other essential amenities just minutes away. Ideal for families or professionals looking for a comfortable home in a central location. Interested? Contact us today to schedule a viewing and make this house your next home.

title: For Rent – Spacious 2-Bedroom Apartments | Juan Domingo, Mahuma, Curaçao
description: Comfortable and spacious 2-bedroom apartments available for rent in the highly desirable Juan Domingo / Mahuma area of Curaçao. Conveniently located near the airport, supermarkets, gas stations, the university, and within walking distance of a minimarket, these apartments offer the perfect combination of comfort, accessibility, and practicality. Each apartment features an open-concept living room and kitchen, two spacious bedrooms, one bathroom, a private balcony with refreshing natural airflow, private parking, individual water and prepaid electricity meters, and a private outdoor clothes drying area. Ideal for professionals, couples, or small families seeking a centrally located home. The upper apartment will be available from 1 July and the ground floor apartment from 8 July. Contact Bai Pe Real Estate today to schedule a viewing.
features: Ground floor apartment available from 8 July
